channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: CLion Integration for Zephyr Project - Thu May 28 09:10:11 UTC 2026
item.description:
Provides a direct support for West (Zephyr’s meta-tool) in CLion IDE. CLion automatically recognizes the West project as a CMake project with additional features to...
vendor: JetBrains s.r.o. downloads: 20 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.intellij.clion.west
